---
title: "Constance Evelyn Wyndham, Lady Leconfield"
---

## Constance Evelyn Wyndham, Lady Leconfield

**Dates:** 1846-1939

**Maiden name:** (Primrose)

### Description

Daughter of the Lady Dalmeny whose picture CMY admired, she married (1867) the 1st Lord Leconfield and had nine children.

### Letters

- [To Lady Leconfield, May 26th [1899]](../letters/3407_To_Lady_Leconfield.html)
- [To Lady Leconfield, May 23d 1899](../letters/3406_To_Lady_Leconfield.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
